title: Products for Consumers, Small Businesses, and Accountants
note: Documents Intuit's product portfolio, including TurboTax, QuickBooks, Credit Karma, Mailchimp, and Pro Tax positioning.

title: Intuit Fiscal 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary source for fiscal 2025 revenue, profitability, segment mix, tax-season concentration, and business risk context.

title: Intuit (INTU) Market Cap & Net Worth
note: Recent public-market reference reporting Intuit market capitalization of about $112.5 billion as of 2026-05-07.

title: TurboTax Official Site
note: Product source for TurboTax positioning, filing offers, and eligibility details for free simple returns.

title: QuickBooks Official Site
note: Product source for QuickBooks positioning around accounting, AI assistance, tax readiness, payments, bills, expenses, and expert support.

title: IRS-Public/direct-file
note: Open-source Direct File repository documenting an interview-based direct federal tax filing service, state API handoff, and excluded sensitive components.

title: OpenTaxSolver
note: Open-source tax preparation software source for current-year downloads, source availability, documentation, and TurboTax alternative framing.

title: GnuCash Free Accounting Software
note: Open-source accounting source documenting GPL licensing, small-business use, source code availability, and cross-platform support.

title: akaunting/akaunting
note: Public repository for Akaunting online accounting software, including installation requirements, license note, release activity, and project scope.
